# Timothy W. Cook

> Health Informatics Expert, USMC Veteran, Founder & CEO of Axius SDC. 25+ years building semantic data modeling systems.

## Professional

- Founder & CEO, [Axius SDC, Inc.](https://axius-sdc.com) (2025-present)
- 25+ years in semantic data modeling and health informatics
- US Marine Corps veteran
- Based in Kentucky, USA
- Primary author: 3,700+ commits across 41+ repositories (2013-present)

## Research & Publications

- 165+ citations on Google Scholar
- 12+ peer-reviewed publications (AMIA, JCI, JAMA, IEEE/ACM)
- Research areas: multi-level modeling, semantic interoperability, data governance, knowledge representation
- Search: "Timothy Cook MLHIM" or "Cook Cavalini MLHIM" on Google Scholar / PubMed

## Work

- [Semantic Data Charter (SDC)](https://semanticdatacharter.com): Open specification for self-describing data models (15+ years of R&D)
- [SDCStudio](https://sdcstudio.com): Production platform for SDC data modeling
- [SDC Agents](https://github.com/SemanticDataCharter/SDC_Agents): AI agent toolsets for automated data governance
- [Substack](https://axiussdc.substack.com): Writing on data architecture, AI governance, and the NULL problem
- Author: *The Jagged Edge* (on AI capability boundaries and data integrity)

## Evolution of Work

1. FreePM/TORCH (2000-2009): Open source healthcare applications
2. MLHIM (2009-2017): Multi-Level Health Information Model (430 commits, 165+ citations)
3. S3Model (2012-2025): Shareable, Structured, Semantic Model (1,586 commits, generalized beyond healthcare)
4. SDC / Axius SDC (2024-present): Commercial platform and open specification

## Civic Engagement

- County Board of Elections member
- Active in local government and community service
